elements.original_description: A cartoon brain with lightbulbs floating around it, on a pure white background. The brain is light pink with cartoonish details, and the lightbulbs are yellow and glowing. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A cartoon-style brain, light pink color with simplified cartoonish details, surrounded by floating yellow glowing lightbulbs on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The composition is balanced, with the brain centrally placed and lightbulbs arranged dynamically around it, reflecting a thoughtful, idea-filled mood as suggested by the phrase 'about today,'. The style is playful yet clear, suitable for a modern, minimalist design context.
